channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Lone star ticks spread across much of the U.S. Here's what to know
item.description: This tick actively hunts humans and can transmit a dangerous red meat allergy. The New Yorker's Burkhard Bilger discusses the lone star...

item.title: SCOTUS upholds birthright citizenship. Plus, key Colorado primary results
item.description: The Supreme Court upheld birthright citizenship on constitutional grounds on its final day. A Democratic socialist won the Democratic...

item.title: Americans attend World Cup in record numbers
item.description: Though the U.S. is not yet a true soccer nation, the past three weeks have hinted at what that might feel like.

item.title: Funerals held for 14 Pakistani children killed in tutoring center collapse
item.description: Authorities are investigating whether construction negligence caused the building collapse in Lahore on Tuesday.
